text.title: PM Certification Alignment 2026 Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding the pm-certification-alignment-2026 methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; the final rule defines when to skip this methodology entirely.

rule.statement: Curriculum hour weighting MUST track 2026 ECO percentages (People 33% / Process 41% / Business 26%) ± 3pp.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Every ECO task MUST map to ≥1 content unit; uncovered tasks MUST appear in gap plan.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Practice-exam item bank MUST be rebalanced to 2026 weights before students take mock exams.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Business Environment content MUST receive ≥3× pre-2026 hours given 8%→26% jump.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Alignment artefact MUST carry the 2026-07-01 effective date.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Skip for pre-2026 exam sittings or non-PMP certifications.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.
